extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
05a9270d-ff1e-481f-b5f0-b295f99bcdda.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
05a9270d-ff1e-481f-b5f0-b295f99bcdda.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
05a9270d-ff1e-481f-b5f0-b295f99bcdda.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
05a9270d-ff1e-481f-b5f0-b295f99bcdda.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
05a9270d-ff1e-481f-b5f0-b295f99bcdda.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
81681454-6219-49d0-b84e-6e343e74eac5.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
81681454-6219-49d0-b84e-6e343e74eac5.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
81681454-6219-49d0-b84e-6e343e74eac5.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
81681454-6219-49d0-b84e-6e343e74eac5.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
8ba616d1-a705-482b-a2bf-7fb57a43a6a2.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
8ba616d1-a705-482b-a2bf-7fb57a43a6a2.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
8ba616d1-a705-482b-a2bf-7fb57a43a6a2.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
8ba616d1-a705-482b-a2bf-7fb57a43a6a2.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

caveats.detail: Proxy selection may dominate the result.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Macro releases require explicit publication-lag handling.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

53c8641b-8a6c-4798-a5d6-3a44b111476b.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
53c8641b-8a6c-4798-a5d6-3a44b111476b.label: primary
53c8641b-8a6c-4798-a5d6-3a44b111476b.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
53c8641b-8a6c-4798-a5d6-3a44b111476b.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
53c8641b-8a6c-4798-a5d6-3a44b111476b.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
53c8641b-8a6c-4798-a5d6-3a44b111476b.title: Primary macro transmission

caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

86755403-6710-4d51-89a9-bec8d89c1213.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
86755403-6710-4d51-89a9-bec8d89c1213.label: counterfactual
86755403-6710-4d51-89a9-bec8d89c1213.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
86755403-6710-4d51-89a9-bec8d89c1213.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
86755403-6710-4d51-89a9-bec8d89c1213.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
86755403-6710-4d51-89a9-bec8d89c1213.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

894d96aa-ac4c-4548-9e5f-7ef331920eee.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
894d96aa-ac4c-4548-9e5f-7ef331920eee.label: regime
894d96aa-ac4c-4548-9e5f-7ef331920eee.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
894d96aa-ac4c-4548-9e5f-7ef331920eee.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
894d96aa-ac4c-4548-9e5f-7ef331920eee.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
894d96aa-ac4c-4548-9e5f-7ef331920eee.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
